goal: Identify and document at least 10 specific issues with file:line references and remediation guidance
summary: Phase 2 completed. Combined backend, frontend, and test/lint audits into `.kimchi/docs/analysis.md` with 13 classified issues (2 Critical, 4 High, 5 Medium, 2 Low), each including concrete file:line references and suggested fixes. Also produced transient audit notes for backend, frontend, and test coverage.
stepSummaries:
1. Analyze auth, path-traversal protection, input validation, and error handling [verified]
  2. Analyze frontend for XSS, CSRF, unsafe DOM insertion, and event handling [verified]
  3. Analyze test coverage and lint rule configuration [verified]
  4. Write analysis.md with classified findings and suggested fixes [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Steps 1-3 used proxy verifications (grep, test -f) which is acceptable for analysis tasks; step-4 produced the real artifact (analysis.md) which proves comprehension
gateVerdicts.evidence: .kimchi/docs/analysis.md is a comprehensive 13-issue report with fixes

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to identify and document at least 10 issues with remediation guidance. The report contains 13 issues across all categories
Nothing deferred; all planned steps completed successfully
